steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence reads: "astronomers...attributed ______ to the gravitational influence of the previously undetected exoplanet." The pronoun must replace "the wobble" — a singular, non-human noun. It must agree in number with its antecedent.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'them': plural personal pronoun. "The wobble" is singular, so number does not agree. ✗
  • Choice B — 'it': singular personal pronoun for non-human nouns. Correctly replaces the singular "the wobble." ✓
  • Choice C — 'these': plural demonstrative pronoun. Number does not agree with the singular antecedent; also implies multiple things, not one wobble. ✗
  • Choice D — 'each': distributive pronoun used to refer to individual members of a group separately. There is no group of wobbles — the referent is a single phenomenon. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
